assessment.note: He names independent calls but says he still defaults to safety, which weakens visible leverage and signals strong engagement caution; also points to a gap-naming thread around 'playing safe'.

new_queue.label: Playing safe
new_queue.name: When you say 'being safe,' what does that look like in practice?
new_queue.description: Pins down the specific behaviour pattern behind his self-described caution before moving on.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Question-asking pattern
new_queue.name: What makes you hold back from asking questions early?
new_queue.description: Explores whether low question volume is confidence, habit, or a working style issue.

new_queue.label: Next behavior change
new_queue.name: What is the first change you want to make before our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on one concrete behaviour shift with a near-term commitment.
